title: Foldable Silicone Collapsible Bucket Bowl Handy Shopping Basket, Multi-functional, Space Saving, Assorted Colours, 10 Litre
features: FOLDABLE & DURABLE SILICONE BUCKET - Foldable nonporous silicone and heavy-duty plastic construction. Folds flat in a snap, lightweight, and durable. Offering all of the versatility and practical use of your average bucket, the silicone bucket can be collapsed and hung up on your utility room’s wall, or stored flat on a shelf.

MULTI-PURPOSE - Use it for cleaning, toting stuff around, picnics, fishing and of course no camping trip would be complete without a versatile bucket. Collapsible and easy to store when not in use; this bucket turns space-saving into an art form.

10 LITRE LARGE SIZE - Holds 10 L and features a pouring spout. Designed using foldable nonporous silicone and heavy-duty plastic, you’ll find that this is a product that is as durable as it is efficient. With a spout for pouring, this bucket can hold up to 10 litres of water – which will make mopping those floors a breeze!
WITH HANDLE - Sturdy handle for easy toting. Keep it at home, get one for the boat and the camper, and store one in the car for those bucket emergencies!

DIMENSIONS - This durable bucket measures approx. W32 cm x H25 cm / W12.5" x H10" when expanded and W32 cm x H5.5 cm / W12.5 x H2" collapsed. Hangs up on any hook, for ease of storage. Comes in many assorted colours from which one is randomly sent. Weighs only approx. 400 grams.
